entry.name: pdd-cli
entry.domain: PDD applied to its own engine (the gate + MAP + mutation CLI, self-run)
entry.architecture: gate packs + MAP spine (atlas/classify/carve) + mutation grade

analysis.fullMapNote: Genuine session-authored MAP: the self-run experiment (2026-06-21), four model arms (Opus-raw, Sonnet-PDD, Sonnet-raw, Haiku-PDD) over cli/src at commit 9bf9cfe, neutral blind Opus judge. 67 distinct verified-real issues across arms; this snapshot carries the 51 with file:line in the two-arm appendix, every one classification=confirmed. Findings predate Phase-2 remediation, so most are already fixed on current main. Grade: gates 0.42 (262 mutants, this commit); packs/typescript 0.51 (872 mutants, validated, identical code). Finding KIND is inferred from the verified description; severity is the finder/judge tag, the 9 overlap findings defaulted to medium.
analysis.coverageDetail: node --test --experimental-test-coverage, src-scoped, at 9bf9cfe: 86.5% lines, 78.7% branch, 80.3% funcs
